step_rationale: Anti-apoptotic BCL-2 family protein; cardiomyocyte protection against ischemic death.
mechanism: Bcl-2 overexpression suppresses Bax-mediated mitochondrial apoptosis and protects cardiomyocytes against ischemic necrosis in myocardial infarction.
